name: Cashfund
description_short: Cashfund provides small business loans up to $500,000 with approval decisions in as little as 4 hours and funding within 24 hours, requiring minimal eligibility criteria.
description_long:
Cashfund is a small business lending company that specializes in rapid-approval business loans for entrepreneurs and established business owners. The company positions itself as a fast alternative to traditional bank lending, emphasizing speed and accessibility as core competitive advantages in the small business financing market.

Cashfund offers unsecured business loans ranging up to $500,000 with no stated spending restrictions on borrowed funds. The application and approval process is designed for speed, with decisions made in as little as 4 hours and funding available within 24 hours. The company advertises a 93% approval rate and targets businesses that meet three basic criteria: at least 1 year of operating history, a minimum credit score of 500, and monthly revenue of $15,000 or more.

What distinguishes Cashfund is its combination of speed, high approval rates, and low eligibility barriers compared to traditional SBA loans or bank financing. The company emphasizes straightforward underwriting without complex application processes, and promotes its customer service as knowledgeable and responsive. The absence of spending restrictions is notable—borrowers can use funds flexibly rather than for specific purposes like equipment or inventory.

Based on publicly available information from their website, Cashfund operates as a legitimate business lender, though the extremely high approval rate (93%) and rapid funding timelines suggest their underwriting may involve trade-offs such as higher interest rates or fees not detailed on their homepage. Prospective borrowers should thoroughly review loan terms, APR, and all associated fees before committing, as the website does not disclose pricing details. The minimum revenue requirement ($15k monthly) excludes early-stage or very small businesses.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Approval decisions as fast as 4 hours with funding within 24 hours
Loans up to $500,000 available for qualifying businesses
Advertised 93% approval rate with minimal eligibility barriers
No spending restrictions—funds can be used for any legitimate business purpose
Minimum credit score of only 500, accommodating borrowers with imperfect credit
Only 1 year of operating history required, helping newer established businesses
Described customer service support with dedicated phone line (1-800-897-9907)
cons: Website does not disclose interest rates, APR, or fee structures
93% approval rate is unusually high and may indicate loose underwriting or higher costs
Minimum $15,000 monthly revenue requirement excludes many small or startup businesses
Limited detail on loan terms, repayment periods, or qualification specifics
No information on whether loans are secured or unsecured beyond general marketing language
best_for: Established small business owners needing quick capital for time-sensitive opportunities
Entrepreneurs with fair credit (500+) who don't qualify for traditional bank loans
Businesses requiring funding in days rather than weeks or months
Companies with at least $180,000 annual revenue needing flexible-use business financing
diagnosis: Cashfund is best suited for established small business owners with at least 1 year of operating history, monthly revenue of $15,000+, and credit scores of 500 or above who prioritize speed over comprehensive loan shopping. The primary caveat is that interest rates and full fee structures are not disclosed on their website, so borrowers must contact them directly to compare costs against other business lenders before accepting any offer.
services: Fast-track loan applications with 4-hour approval decisions
Business loans with no spending restrictions
Lending to businesses with credit scores of 500 or higher
Financing for businesses with 1+ year operating history
Flexible business financing for expansion, operations, or other uses
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
